messages.content: My wife and I are looking for a 4-bedroom home in the Denver area. We have two kids so good school districts are a must. Our budget is $650,000.

Denver is a great market for families! With your budget and school priorities, I'd suggest looking at Highlands Ranch, Centennial, or Littleton — all have top-rated school districts. Highlands Ranch in particular has a lot of 4-bedroom options with family-friendly neighborhoods and parks. Want me to start a search in those areas?
